messages.content:
Howdy Michael,

Thanks for the follow :) I'm glad you've shown interest in my lifestyle.

I love the look of your profile! You've got some cool pics.

I'm not sure if you're interested, but I've found a way to turn my travels into profit using social media. This has allowed me to quit my job, so I can travel the world full-time!

I've actually released a new video that explains how I started my digital entrepreneurship. You can check it out in my bio, @flywithme_dz, if you're interested in learning how to do the same.

If you are, make sure to add me on Facebook after checking out the video, and we'll connect!

Chat soon,
Dajana :)
